column1: # Corpus of real Orchestrator/Identity error envelopes and the readable text
# OrchException.ExtractMessage must surface from each. Drives
# HOW TO ADD A CASE: whenever an API call returns an error you had to read raw,
# paste it here as one line:
#     <expected substring><TAB><raw error JSON on one line>
# The <expected substring> is text that MUST appear in the extracted message
# (a stable, human-meaningful fragment — not the trace id). Lines starting with
# '#' and blank lines are ignored. Columns are separated by a single TAB.
# Source of the seed cases: ErrorsCollection.txt (observed 2026-05).
